rows.label: qev013903_MSG0001
rows.name:
So that woman made a move behind my
back... How should I repay this grudge...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh, if it isn't the two-faced
traitor. Have you finally
come to stop me by force?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0011
rows.name:
Explain to Alex that Eliza
asked you to come in peace.

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0020
rows.name: Convince

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0021
rows.name:
Persuade Alex to stop his
crimes and turn himself in.

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0003
rows.name:
I believed we could become close
friends... It seems I was overconfident.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0004
rows.name:
And I see... You've sunk to becoming
a pawn for that ignorant woman...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0005
rows.name: Crime? What about this is a crime?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0006
rows.name:
It is the best countermeasure before
everything is replaced by the aliens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oh, well well, comrade. Have you
taken an interest in our activities
and visited us again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0013
rows.name:
Very well. I do not dislike
a battle of words either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0014
rows.name:
If I find reason in your argument,
I will give up gracefully.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0015
rows.name:
Rest assured. If my heart is
moved by your statements, I
promise to let you go honestly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0016
rows.name:
I will also have my waiting
comrades withdraw.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0110
rows.name: Contend

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0111
rows.name:
Assert that not all
xenoforms are hostile.

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0120
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0121
rows.name:
Ask Alex why he can't
compromise with xenoforms.

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0017
rows.name: Have you forgotten the Earth Incident?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0018
rows.name:
Those aliens chose Earth as their
battlefield as if they owned it, and
annihilated it at the end of their conflict.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0019
rows.name:
I will never forget the sin of the aliens
who took the lives of 9.9 billion humans,
not until this body is shattered to pieces![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0020
rows.name:
...These Ma-non will surely
bring harm to our city one
day, just like those others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0021
rows.name:
Why don't you understand that! Could
it be you've already been brainwashed
by their suspicious devices?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0022
rows.name:
Compromise? The ones who selfishly
trampled on us are the aliens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0023
rows.name:
They trampled onto our land just
to enrich their own lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0024
rows.name:
How do you expect to have a discussion
with guys like that!? It's laughable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0210
rows.name: Cite an Example

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0211
rows.name:
Say that the arms manufacturers
prove interspecies cooperation.

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0220
rows.name: Rebut

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0221
rows.name:
Tell Alex that his beliefs
do not justify violence.

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0025
rows.name:
For now, yes. But do you think this
relationship will continue permanently?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0026
rows.name:
Even among us Earthlings alone,
conflict never ceased back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0027
rows.name:
It was never realized even when we spoke
the same language and looked similar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yes... for those whose language, culture, and
appearance differ to understand each other
without conflict... is fundamentally impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0029
rows.name:
Even now, they do not understand us.
They seem to have no grasp of why
they are being put in a tight spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0030
rows.name:
What part of my story have
you been listening to?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0031
rows.name:
Eventually, Earthlings will be replaced
by them and become slaves. This is a
preemptive strike before that happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Now then. What kind of bizarre
theory will you show me next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0310
rows.name: Persist

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0311
rows.name:
Try to convince Alex that
humans cannot survive alone.

rows.label: qev013903_JNK0320
rows.name: Fight

rows.label: qev013903_SEL0321
rows.name:
Accept that words are futile,
and stop Alex by force.

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0033
rows.name:
To think their existence would
make you say that much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0034
rows.name:
It's true that without their cooperation,
NLA might be in ruins by now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0035
rows.name: Am I... mistaken...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0036
rows.name: ...Kufufu! Ahaha! Ahahahahahahahaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0037
rows.name:
You eyesore... So you were
watching from somewhere...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0038
rows.name: Dammit! Stop messing around!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0039
rows.name:
Have you ever faced the
darkness in their hearts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0040
rows.name:
Fighting, plundering, and their heads
are filled with nothing but money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0041
rows.name:
Every alien is the same. There
is no one who will truly walk
hand-in-hand with Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0042
rows.name:
You and Eliza, who don't even
understand that, are no different
from my sworn enemies!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0043
rows.name:
So you rely on force after all. I
wonder what Eliza would think...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0044
rows.name:
No, comrade, do not be depressed.
For this world can only be made
noble through the fear of death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0045
rows.name: Guh... I'm no match...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'll retreat for today,
but I won't give up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0047
rows.name:
No matter how beneficial the
aliens may be to NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0048
rows.name:
I can't back down anymore! One day, I
will surely drive them out of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0049
rows.name: Guh... I'm no match...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0050
rows.name:
I'll retreat for today,
but I won't give up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0051
rows.name:
One day, I will surely annihilate
the aliens infesting our NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013903_MSG0052
rows.name:
Tell Eliza that if she interferes
with us any further, she will lose
her life! Now... farewell![ST:wait ]
